title: To Dr. Maxwell, On Jessie Staig's Recovery.
content:
Maxwell, if merit here you crave
            That merit I deny,
        You save fair Jessie from the grave,
            An angel could not die.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Burns, titled "To Dr. Maxwell, On Jessie Staig's Recovery.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
